isolation.cookieHandling: Captured the exact set-cookie header from POST /api/auth/sign-in/email for each user and reused the resulting cookie pair in explicit Cookie headers per request.
isolation.mutationBoundary: Only POST /trpc/onboarding.complete for the reactivation fixture user was mutated.

assertions.title: Existing accepted membership is reactivated instead of duplicated

steps.action: Sign in as the seeded reactivation user auth-shell-round1-reactivation@example.com and capture the exact auth cookie from POST /api/auth/sign-in/email
steps.expected: HTTP 200 and an isolated auth cookie for the reactivation user
steps.observed: POST /api/auth/sign-in/email -> 200 and an auth cookie was captured for reuse in explicit Cookie headers.

steps.action: Call POST /trpc/onboarding.complete with valid onboarding data for the reactivation user
steps.expected: The mutation reactivates the pre-seeded workspace 76e63e57-e983-4e0b-8f44-fa4b364e12c2 instead of bootstrapping a duplicate team

steps.action: Fetch GET /trpc/user.me with the same cookie
steps.expected: user.me reports needsOnboarding false and activeTeam.id 76e63e57-e983-4e0b-8f44-fa4b364e12c2
steps.observed: GET /trpc/user.me -> 200 with activeTeam.id 76e63e57-e983-4e0b-8f44-fa4b364e12c2 and needsOnboarding False.

steps.action: Fetch GET /trpc/team.current with the same cookie
steps.expected: team.current resolves the same pre-seeded workspace 76e63e57-e983-4e0b-8f44-fa4b364e12c2

evidence.network: POST /trpc/onboarding.complete -> 200; GET /trpc/user.me -> 200; GET /trpc/team.current -> 200; all responses resolved team 76e63e57-e983-4e0b-8f44-fa4b364e12c2 (auth-shell-round1 Reactivation Workspace).

assertions.title: Stale stored team context recovers before forcing onboarding

steps.action: Sign in as the seeded staleFallback user auth-shell-round1-stale-fallback@example.com and capture the exact auth cookie from POST /api/auth/sign-in/email
steps.expected: HTTP 200 and an isolated cookie for the stale fallback user
steps.observed: POST /api/auth/sign-in/email -> 200 and an auth cookie was captured for the stale fallback user.

steps.action: Fetch GET /trpc/user.me for the stale-pointer fallback user
steps.expected: user.me recovers to fallback workspace 569a489d-660c-44aa-8c86-762f470b33ff and does not force onboarding
steps.observed: GET /trpc/user.me -> 200 with activeTeam.id 569a489d-660c-44aa-8c86-762f470b33ff and needsOnboarding False.

steps.action: Fetch GET /trpc/team.current for the stale-pointer fallback user
Fetch GET /trpc/privateData for the stale-pointer fallback user
steps.expected: protected team data succeeds against fallback workspace 569a489d-660c-44aa-8c86-762f470b33ff

steps.action: Sign in as the seeded conflicting user auth-shell-round1-conflicting@example.com and capture the exact auth cookie from POST /api/auth/sign-in/email
steps.expected: HTTP 200 and an isolated cookie for the conflicting user
steps.observed: POST /api/auth/sign-in/email -> 200 and an auth cookie was captured for the conflicting user.

steps.action: Fetch GET /trpc/user.me for the conflicting-pointer user
steps.expected: user.me honors activeMembershipId precedence and resolves workspace 53713ba0-d149-4238-a438-8686245623a9 instead of foreign workspace fba2a6b4-3f7f-4da8-a553-b0a2242cb894
steps.observed: GET /trpc/user.me -> 200 with activeTeam.id 53713ba0-d149-4238-a438-8686245623a9 and needsOnboarding False.

steps.action: Fetch GET /trpc/team.current for the conflicting-pointer user
steps.expected: team.current resolves workspace 53713ba0-d149-4238-a438-8686245623a9 instead of foreign workspace fba2a6b4-3f7f-4da8-a553-b0a2242cb894

steps.action: Fetch GET /trpc/privateData for the conflicting-pointer user
steps.expected: protected team data succeeds for workspace 53713ba0-d149-4238-a438-8686245623a9 and not fba2a6b4-3f7f-4da8-a553-b0a2242cb894

evidence.network: staleFallback: GET /trpc/user.me -> 200, GET /trpc/team.current -> 200, GET /trpc/privateData -> 200 with recovered team 569a489d-660c-44aa-8c86-762f470b33ff (auth-shell-round1 Stale Fallback Workspace); conflicting: GET /trpc/user.me -> 200, GET /trpc/team.current -> 200, GET /trpc/privateData -> 200 with membership-precedence team 53713ba0-d149-4238-a438-8686245623a9 (auth-shell-round1 Conflicting Primary Workspace) instead of fba2a6b4-3f7f-4da8-a553-b0a2242cb894 (auth-shell-round1 Foreign Workspace).

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed. Reactivation returned the seeded workspace, stale pointers fell back to the valid membership workspace, and conflicting activeTeamId state yielded to activeMembershipId precedence across user.me, team.current, and privateData.
